title: pavonia fruticosa var. typhalaea
intro: Pavonia fruticosa var. typhalaea, also known as Rocky Mountain Rosemallow or Mexican Rosemallow, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pavonia fruticosa var. typhalaea include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
